hotel_name: Comfort Inn Fairfield Napa Valley Area

reviews.title: Crap
reviews.text: Doesn’t even deserve a star.

reviews.title: Canceled because of rude staff.
reviews.negatives: Staff was incredibly rude when I inquired about the possibility of early check-in. Refused to even try to give me an answer regarding the timeline. Fortunately, I was able to cancel my reservation and stay at the Best Western nearby.

reviews.title: A bit odd to bring in the new year
reviews.text: For starters I wasn’t aware that the holding fee would be $150 that should have been in the notes . Second I was given a room all the way in the back. Thirdly my ice bucket had dried up urine in it and it reeked .

reviews.title: Astronomically expensive for what you get.  Hyatt prices for a Motel 6 stay experience (at best)
reviews.negatives: Price - Stupid expensive for what you get. Breakfast - nothing special, bought groceries after first day because there was nothing appealing. Pool - looked dirty.  Walls - paper thin. Bathroom - leaky faucets, poor damage repairs. Location - centrally located, but rough part of town.  Won't go back again.

reviews.title: Really Sketchy
reviews.text: Went to check in and wife pulled on my sleve and said, "This place is way tooooo sketchy, lets go some where else!!"  Book at you risk!!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: They  ignored me when I told them about a  criminal  who was not supposed to be there

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Spend a bit more for somewhere better

reviews.title: Would not stay again. Disappointing Comfort Inn.
reviews.negatives: It was dirty and gross

reviews.title: Eggs n Sausage w/Whole Wheat toast.
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: HORRIBLE STAFF AND OVERPRICED
reviews.negatives: Front desk staff "Mata" (I believe her was her name) on Sunday, June 16th, 2024, was EXTREAMLY RUDE, refused to give me the key to the room that was saved for me to pick up at the front desk the night before (my flight was laid over in Phoenix, and I was in a tremendous hurry for a conference that day so the person who booked the room for me checked me in with the night manager the night before).  She treated me like I was there to serve and wait on her, and when I said it was saved for me and I was running short on time she berated me for saying I was in a hurry.  She should be fired, and I don't say that lightly; I have never been treated so rudely and poorly by anyone, and I am generally a very polite and friendly person.  As for the cost of the room, it was overpriced and not on par with even a Motel 6.  -Needless to say, I won't be staying at any Comfort Suites hotels ever again.

reviews.title: good proximity to Napa = freeway noise
reviews.text:
I loved the location and price. Chosen for one night's sleep after wine tasting. Brought a bathing suit but didn't make it to the pool area. I picked this one over others in the area because it seemed further from the freeway but I don't think there's any getting away from the traffic noise. 

Dirty footprints when I stepped into the shower told me the carpets/floors were not clean. My dad said the same thing about his room. It's an older hotel but not the worst I've seen. 

Breakfast was just ok. Food but not the sort I enjoy. Waffle machine. Fried eggs and sausage that seemed to have been cooked in a cookie oven or some other sort of quick thing. No hot sauce or ketchup. Everything was single use going into the landfill. Made me sad.

Staff was present. Felt safe.

reviews.title: This place was absolutely filthy!!!!
reviews.negatives: This was the most dirty, filthy, smelly, disgusting place I have ever stayed. We were supposed to stay 3 nights. We stayed one and left the next morning. I have never seen a hotel with so much dirt! The elevator was disgusting, windows filthy. Price was ridiculous! We stayed next door for less money and a very clean property and room.

reviews.title: Easily could have been better
reviews.text:
First, we didn't know the room opened onto an outside walkway until we got there-- and it was cold out. 
Secondly, there was a bug in the bathroom that I had to remove.
Also, one of the lights in the bathroom wasn't working, and when I turned on the heat, it cycled so loudly I couldn't sleep.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: the staff the flies the bad key machine and the facts that we stayed 3 nights and didn’t get room service once

reviews.title: Good bang for your buck
reviews.text: We have stayed here a few times and my reviews are pretty mixed. The he housekeeping staff and maintenance are very kind and do a good job . They don’t speak much English but not a big issue for me. Overall I think then front desk staff getting an overhaul would make the place 100% better. They are rude most of the time, have poor communication between them so no 2 people have the same information or any idea of an issue or request you have. Can’t say anyone has ever smiled or warmly greeted me, and forget coming to the front desk anytime that’s not between 10 and maybe 8pm. No one there or they are asleep or in the bathroom and if you disturb them , well you’ll know how much yoh never want to do it again. Unprofessional , but maybe you get what you pay for ? Anyways, thankful for the housekeeping and grounds crew. Always pleasant and keeps everything manageable :)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: I was not served because of a technical issue and charged for the room anyway.

reviews.title: Suggetions for Improvement
reviews.text:
We booked the hotel for May 25–26, but we arrived at around 2:00am on the 26th after a long day at Disneyland and long travels. When I approached the front desk, the male staff member was busy on his computer and, without looking at me, said, “I’ll be right with you, I’m in the middle of something.” After about 2-3 minutes, my husband arrived after parking the car, and the staff member again said the same thing while continuing to work on his computer.
We were extremely tired, and at that moment all we wanted was to lie down and feel welcomed. He eventually assisted us and was okay overall, but I believe the customer service could have been more considerate and empathetic by acknowledging tired guests more warmly and making them feel welcome.

The next morning during breakfast, I noticed that the eggs and sausage were empty, so I asked the front desk associate if they were going to refill them. She politely said yes and mentioned they were currently cooking more. She immediately went to refill the food right away.

Later, on my way upstairs, I stopped by the front desk again to ask if they had received my reservation. She checked and informed me they had not. I then realized it was actually my mistake because I accidentally booked the dates for May 27–28 instead of May 26–27. She politely asked if I wanted her to cancel it, and I said yes, please. The process was smooth, and her friendly smile made my experience much better compared to the night before.

I also noticed that even when she was busy working on her computer, whenever a guest approached the front desk, she would immediately look up, greet them warmly, and ask how she could help. That small gesture greatly improved the guest experience. Her name is Alejandra, and I want to recognize her excellent customer service.

I would also like to mention that I stayed in Room ***. Please avoid assigning rooms near the emergency exit if possible, because I had difficulty sleeping due to the noise whenever someone entered or exited through the emergency exit door. It often sounded like someone was trying to open my room door.

Additionally, during the power outage, the front desk associate informed me that the elevator could not be used. I asked whether my key card would still work to open the doors, and she said yes. However, when using the stairs, I noticed there was very little lighting on the second-floor stairwell. There was lighting on the first floor, but the second-floor stairs were very dark, making it difficult to see and potentially unsafe. I recommend adding emergency lighting there to help avoid accidents.

Overall, despite a few concerns, I appreciate *** excellent customer service and professionalism, which made the experience much better. Thank you Comfort Inn for listening.

reviews.title: Don’t stay here. The room was $106 but deposit was $200 in person. When I called it was $50
reviews.positives: Don’t stay here. The room was $106 but deposit was $200 in person. When I called it was $50
reviews.negatives: Don’t stay here. The room was $106 but deposit was $200 in person. When I called it was $50

reviews.title: Experience
reviews.text: Fitst time checking in and went to my floor and hotel wasn’t the best the hallways smelled horrible

reviews.title: NEVER STAY HERE
reviews.positives: Nothing I got robbed from there
reviews.negatives: Staff there the worst I've ever had to deal with not saying all but the boy I dealt with needs a lot of improvement robbed me of $248.00 then turned around and got paid a second time would not budge like return money for at least 1 night

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The accommodation was clean, well-heated, and the heater was in good condition, with little noise, which was nice. The breakfast had a waffle maker and included fried eggs, sausage, apples, yogurt, cereal, and milk, making it the best breakfast. I highly recommend this accommodation.

reviews.title: The room location was not smoking but the smell was really bad
reviews.negatives:
The housekeeping service was bad 
They don’t did the service after the first day

reviews.title: Professional staff and clean rooms
reviews.text: Professional staff, the room was clean and presentable. Would stay there again, affordable and clean for that price.

reviews.title: Plain and simple not safe
reviews.positives: Not safe when u have kids period
reviews.negatives: Didn’t feel safe

reviews.title: Good value
reviews.text: The place is clean and comfortable.   The breakfast is average at best.   But for the money it was about what you would expect.

reviews.title: It was dirty, the window was broken and had mildew growing on the drywall.
reviews.negatives: They had guest fighting and screaming in lobby.

reviews.title: Horriblw
reviews.positives:
I stay on my bed to relax and eventual my pants became wet
the previous person must of wet bed and the maid put clean sheets and passed it on.  I was advised that they could move me on that day would need to wait the next day and then I could move. 22 years on the business this was by far the worst hotel with the worst manager and don’t tell people you are going to have complimentary breakfast and then never have it filled after 9 am or get mad cause you ask for more food.  The manager was terrible.  They didn’t even offer to do anything to the bed or that I just sat in somebody else’s piss.  I am disputing charge my friend who was to share room with me and split cost was not able to stay with me.  I was advised because I didn’t want to move on Saturday that I was getting any kind of compensation.  Did I mention that I was here for a Celebration of life.
reviews.negatives: Just about everything but most of all the dirtiness and the worst customer service

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: Overall good stay for the week. Good size room, big TV  and big bed

reviews.title: I won’t stay there again.
reviews.positives: Location was convenient for the purposes of our trip
reviews.negatives: Poorly maintained. Security locks falling off of gates. Sub-par breakfast. No smoking policies are not enforced. Pillows are the size of an airplane pillow. Staff was annoyed when we asked for clean towels. Lack of electrical outlets meant that I had to carry the coffee pot into the bathroom in order to brew coffee. If it’s the little things that make a stay comfortable, this place lacks the little things.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Very friendly staff

reviews.title: Couldn’t have been way better
reviews.negatives: Nothing worked

reviews.title: Not bad for the price
reviews.text: Stayed here for 4 nights. Staff was outstanding. The location was great. The hotel itself could stand for bit of an upgrade but for the price in that area it was pretty decent. I didn't indulge in the free breakfast so I can't comment on that. But I will stay the mini fridge barely had any shelves in it. So the only thing that really fits are beverages. Which sucked. And I can always go for a larger TV. Just minor stuff. Me being petty & picky. But I would definitely stay there again, no question.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Thin walls, could hear noise from other room so loud couldn’t sleep.
Microwave not working, had to change rooms

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: 10 miles from Napa, but much more cost effective.

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.negatives: I was put into a room that has a door that leads from inside rooms to outside rooms. This door never stopped slamming all day and all night. What a nightmare. There are rooms that exit outside onto an outside walkway that lead inside to an indoor hallway to the only elevator. This is on every floor. The door is heavily used and the door closer is clearly set wrong. You can set any hydraulic door closer to close any size door softly and quietly, especially when there is a hotel room directly on either side of it. On top of that, the air conditioner made an unacceptable amount of noise every time it ran. That day temperatures were in the 90’s. These are simple, regular maintenance items that the owner of this establishment can’t be bothered with that are costing revenue and profits due to bad reviews and lost customers. Talk about asinine. The front desk lady appeared irritated and melancholy during check in even though I was polite. What a disappointing experience and waste of money considering the other options in the area.

reviews.title: Nice place and good service
reviews.text: Good recepción atttendand by Avi, helpfull in our questions.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Place needs some upgrades. Our door frame looked like the door was kicked in at one point and fixed and painted over a few times. A group of guests were being extra loud late at night and It seemed like the hotel staff weren't doing anything about it.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Good rate perfect location

reviews.title: Location was perfect near to most things, however the room and some of the staff on this occasion was below average.
reviews.negatives: The rooms were dated and there were roaches in my room. The paint was also peeling off. I stayed there last weekend and the room I got previously was better.

reviews.title: 1 night stay
reviews.text: 2 big beds, surrounded by many food shops.

reviews.title: The front desk staff was excellent. Cleaning staff for room service comedy show...horribleservice..
reviews.negatives:
When addressing the cleaning staff, they pretended not to be able to speak English. So, when I communicated in Spanish,they pretended not to be able to speak Spanish.
I'm bilingual. The cleaning staff behavior was almost comical. They,the cleaning staff, just didn't want any extra work...

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great deal for the money. I would stay there again.

reviews.title: Location was good to get to Bottlerock but I do not plan to return to this location in the future.
reviews.negatives: Room was not serviced.  Trash wasn't removed and beds were not made nor was linen replaced on a daily basis. Bathtub caulking etc. did not look clean. Breakfast was minimal, sausages were cheapest grade. Syrup for waffles was unknown sugar free brand. The only fruit available was some red apples, no bananas, oranges etc. Eggs were a pre-cooked patty. Using the heater made the room smell like burning hair and the ac set off our allergies.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Hh

reviews.title: Discomfort Inn
reviews.negatives: Pool advertised as heated was closed. Workout room had three pieces of broken equipment. Front Desk staff indifferent.

reviews.title: Pleasant stay
reviews.text: The location is what stands out the most. Directly off the freeway and I mean literally off the freeway. You have access to pretty much everything you might crave to eat next door all around your stay. The staff is very welcoming and attentive. Especially front desk member, Alejandra 😊. She definitely makes you feel welcomed as you check in and always has a smile when coming in or out the front door. The free breakfast is the plus. Only thing I would have a comment of is recommended possibly changing or adding different items and not serve the same exact breakfast everyday. Other than that the rooms are clean. Location and establishment feels safe and overall the price is very reasonable for what you want for your stay.

reviews.title: This place is usually a good place to stay but stay away from rooms next to door exit. Kept me up all night. Heard door
reviews.positives: Nice location, lots of restaurants and clean area
reviews.negatives: My room was next to exit door and I heard it closing and opening all night long

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Clean and comfortable hotel!

reviews.title: It was dirty and I felt uncomfortable don’t even have full size pillows
reviews.negatives: The property was dirty and didn’t feel comfortable

reviews.title: My Review
reviews.text: The front desk attendant was very nice and professional. The PROPERTY was clean, and the other staff had a very friendly attitude.  a great deal for your money.

reviews.title: It was ok but they could do better
reviews.negatives: No coffee at the free breakfast, but there was coffee in the lobby. However, it was old and cold; if you’re not going to up keep it, why even offer it? There was also not enough toilet paper in the room.

reviews.title: good
reviews.text: good place

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The man at the front desk was nice and helpful. Offered to help us with bags, because there were no luggage carts available. There was an elevator.
reviews.negatives: We had to switch rooms multiple times. First room, the door wouldn't close properly. Second room, toilet wouldn't flush. Third room, we struggled to open the door because it would get stuck, but we didn't want to move again. The room was dingy and the bathroom was in need of repair. the hotel rooms need an update. Breakfast was just okay, but what I expected.

reviews.title: Nice place to stay
reviews.text: Great location, walking distance to restaurants and other establishments. Friendly and professional staff.  Breakfast is okay. The room is bigger than we expected for the two of us. Will definitely stay here again if we’re in the area.

reviews.title: Awake all night
reviews.positives: The room was nice and comfortable
reviews.negatives: The hotel did not have a quiet time.  Guest walking in and out all night slamming doors.

reviews.title: Perfect! Except…
reviews.text:
Waffles for breakfast! Snacks right across the street- and we went walked to Scandia too, which was very nostalgic.
Only one thing: the channels on the tv were not numerous, although there was soft adult entertainment. My husband and I prefer Forensic Files when we stay at hotels… 
But, as I said, perfect. Television is not that important, and all the important things were perfect.

reviews.title: The lower price is not worth the horrible staff and less than diserable accommodations.
reviews.positives: The location and price were decent.
reviews.negatives: The staff wasn't friendly.   The provided breakfast was horrible. Upon checkout, they stated they were going to charge me for the towels I used after showering.  Had to argue with the staff to get my refundable deposit back.  The guest checking out before me was told the same thing regarding the towels.  We were both able to get our money back, but the situation makes absolutely no sense.  Will not be staying here again.  The hallways smelled of marijuana at all hours of the day and night.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Comfortable Stay.

reviews.title: Ehe
reviews.positives: The location is next to the freeway which is nice.
reviews.negatives: Only one elevator.  Have to walk forever to get the other end of the building.  I have auto immune diseases and that was a struggle for me.  Doors slammed shut instead of closing quietly. Walls were really thin.

reviews.title: Great attentive staff
reviews.text: Location is ideal for everything needed. The staff is great and very attentive and friendly. Alejandra was more than kind and went above and beyond in making you feel welcomed when checking in for my reservation The free breakfast is definitely a plus. I would only say and possibly consider is that it would be nice to change or add things differently for breakfast. Instead of the exact same items served everyday.  Other than that everything is worth what one is paying for their stay.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: You guys run out of breakfast and took awhile to refill it . There was a lot of flys . Stayed two nights and usually in other places that I have stayed the maid comes in and takes the trash out and puts in clean towels but in this one they don’t .

reviews.text: I love it here. I can stay here forever. A lot of people write fake reviews but I'm here to tell you I live 3hrs away and when I come visit family my stay is always welcoming by staff! Kid friendly as well! I LOVE BOOKING A ROOM HERE!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: location was close to our destination, places to eat close by, the beds and temperature in the room were comfortable
reviews.negatives: Noise late at night from the neighbors. The cleanliness was so so, could have been better. The breakfast was just ok, nothing special, suggestions would be more fruit options, maybe peanut butter packs, wheat bagels, greek yogurt, hard boiled eggs.... Think about people that have gluten intolerance or diabetes

reviews.title: Good stay
reviews.text: Stayed for a week. Very clean room. I've stayed here multiple times and never disappoints. Big comfortable king bed. And big tv. Quiet hvac system( at least in the room installed in)

reviews.negatives: No where during reserving the room or in the confirmation did it say anything about $150 deposit! I have never had to pay a deposit before! I stayed at another Comfort Inn in Sacramento and didn’t have to pay a deposit. Then being told it would be 7-10 days before getting it back depending on our bank is ridiculous!

reviews.title: Hotel confortevole e pulito
reviews.text: Il soggiorno è stato positivo. La vicinanza alla Napa Valley ne fa un luogo interessante di passaggio con un notevole vantaggio nel rapporto qualità/prezzo rispetto ad altre sistemazioni in prossimità della valle ove sorgono i vigneti della zona. LA zona in prossimità dell'autostrada rende il posto utile per chi si muove in automobile e ha bisogno di un punto d'appoggio per soggiornarvi una notte prima di proseguire nel viaggio.
reviews.positives: posizione vicino alla freeway, cordialità personale, vicinanza alla Napa Valley

reviews.title: Our Sure Stay stay!
reviews.positives: It was walking distance to a fantastic restaurant. They did fulfill one request; to be fairly close to elevator.
reviews.negatives:
The mattress was as hard as a rock. The bottom sheet was not fitted and did not even fit the bed properly to tuck in. I believe it was a double bed and not a queen. Put "want privacy" card on door and housemaid went in anyway. They had no extra products to help with our needs; including an extra blanket. 
For being a subsidiary of Best Western....it lacked in everything Best Western is known for. The picture on the web site makes the room look MUCH bigger and nicer than it is!!!!!

reviews.title: Disappointed overall, won’t stay again.
reviews.negatives: Fitness equipment didn’t work properly, locks were questionable on doors and windows, cramped spaces, floors seemed dirty and overall out of date.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: It was one of the closest places to the wedding we attended. Free breakfast is always nice!
reviews.negatives: Just a bit old and run down

reviews.title: Wasn't expecting a lot, appreciated the good cost.
reviews.negatives: Bathroom had peeling paint and mildew below the sink.

reviews.title: Meh
reviews.positives: The location is good and the bed was comfortable.
reviews.negatives: Room key stopped working every day. Hotel needs an update, old decor makes it look dirty.

reviews.title: I thought it was a good place to stay.
reviews.positives: The staff were friendly and welcoming and the price reasonable. The bed was comfortable.
reviews.negatives: All the carpets in the halls and in the room  were dirty in the corners and edges and also the elevator. Made the whole place feel bad.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Hall getting to the rooms downstairs

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Coffee was meh. Check in was slow and they had me wait until 3. Two night stay, I was expecting better treatment.

reviews.title: The elevator was out we were on the third floor
reviews.negatives: Elevator was out the second day we were there

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: My room had bad cigarette smell. It overshadowed everything else. That’s the only bad thing.

reviews.title: Clean quiet place to stay on way to Oakland Airport
reviews.positives: The staff were very helpful.  The room was very clean and bed was decent.
reviews.negatives:
They ran my card several times because their machine was causing errors.    My bank froze my card and despite talking with the owner/manager it still showed up multiple times on my bank account.   Bank will be contacting manager to straighten out.


The other thing that would be helpful is to wash down the outside of the building.   The parking lot had garbage as well.   I recognize you can’t control what homeless people do but a clean outside and cleaned stairs and walk way behind the gates would go a long way.   

I did not have time to try the breakfast so I can’t speak to that.

Overall I would probably stay again as the room was clean and quiet though mattress is starting to show wear.

reviews.title: A reasonable place to stay without extra fees, and bkfst.
reviews.positives: Location, location, location it's a convenient place to stay between Sacramento, and the Bay. Breakfast was good and staff was very nice, room was a nice place to relax and just enjoy a overnight plus many restaurants across the street and kid-e-corner to the hotel (if your getting off along drive to rest or need a reasonable priced hotel this is the one) 👌

reviews.title: Nice to sleep but don't expect much
reviews.negatives: The breakfast was very very so so compare to other hotels they hardly have anything serve

reviews.title: Great value for price ! Easy checkin, front desk let me checkin about an hour early without charge.
reviews.negatives: Super loud guests coming in at 2-3 am every night. There’s no soundproofing on the doors

reviews.title: Ok for one night
reviews.positives: Room had basic amenities and toiletries.

reviews.title: good stay
reviews.negatives: staff wasn't very attentive

reviews.title: Convenient. Clean. Comfortable bed.
reviews.positives: Bed was comfortable. Room was clean.
reviews.negatives: Nothing. It was a simple room that was clean and comfortable.

reviews.title: Just OK. You pay what you get.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast are so poor.

reviews.title: everything was cool besides them keeping a deposit on my card after asking me if I just want to use cash. My day was day
reviews.negatives: if you want to swim, do not go there Pool, and whoever is maintain it looks horrible😂😂😂😂😂

reviews.title: Nice place to stay for a night, close to lots of food.
reviews.negatives:
Pool very dirty , instead of cleaning the pool the staff (3) was sweeping the parking lot. The
breakfast was not good , eggs were poached and rubbery (horrible taste). 
The elevator inspection certificate expired for their only elevator, it expired over a year ago in 2022. Front desk said they knew the elevator certificate expired.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives:
Front desk not customer oriented. Language not appropriate. 
Breakfast pretty bad.

reviews.title: Restful and enjoyable that we stayed an extra night.
reviews.negatives: Dirty pool and old broken exercise equipment.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: My room was next to a very busy area

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The front desk lady was very polite and with an excellent customer service.

reviews.title: Nice value for the money.
reviews.positives: Clean, safe, decent place to stay for the money. Staff was nice. It was also in a convenient location. Restaurants, convenient stores, and another places were within a walking distance.
reviews.negatives: Shower curtain didn’t close very well, so more water got on the floor than normal. By the time I got to breakfast (about 8:30am) the eggs and sausage were cold. I still ate them, but would’ve been nicer if they were warmer.

reviews.title: It was fine for my purposes and I would stay again, good value for the room.
reviews.positives: Good location, easy access to the freeway
reviews.negatives: It’s an older property so you have to use stairs. My room was located on the pool side and there were kids out there screaming and splashing when I was trying to sleep. I checked but no hours for use were posted at the pool. Breakfast left a little to be desired, not much variety and no fruit.

reviews.title: It was enjoyable
reviews.negatives: There were ants in the room.

reviews.title: I loved the location close to freeway
reviews.negatives: Beds

reviews.title: Comfy bed, spacious room, free breakfast
reviews.positives: The bed was very comfy and had plenty of pillows.  Spacious room and bathroom with a workspace for doing office work. Free breakfast has protein (sausage and egg)  carb (cereal, toast, muffins, waffle) coffee and juice choices.  There was a roller to help bring my luggage upstairs.
reviews.negatives: Kinda messy floor and elevator that had chips, candy wrappers, and broken nails on the floor.  Allergies were going crazy in the hotel.

reviews.title: It was medium.
reviews.positives: Both mornings breakfast was gone by the time I arrived.  I usually only want cereal but even that was gone.
reviews.negatives:
More fruit, non breakfast items like cheese & crackers.  More of a variety. I picked this betel for proximity to my mom’s hospital and breakfast included. 
The same empty beer can was by the pool for the three days I was there.  I felt no one was paying attention to the details.

reviews.title: Well, everything else is fine.
reviews.positives: I like the location is good.
reviews.negatives: The pool is very small and all the guests can see you when they walk down the hall.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: No one at desk when arriving
